Reviewing main.go: missing error handling for ListenAndServe. Also no graceful shutdown.
<tool_call><function=subagent><parameter=name>worker</parameter><parameter=task>Fix main.go: add graceful shutdown with signal handling, wrap log.Fatal properly

Current code:
package main

import (
	"fmt"
	"log"
	"net/http"
)

func main() {
	http.HandleFunc("/", handler)
	log.Fatal(http.ListenAndServe(":8080", nil))
}

func handler(w http.ResponseWriter, r *http.Request) {
	fmt.Fprintf(w, "Hello, World!")
}

Please add: signal.Notify, shutdown with timeout, proper error handling</parameter></function></tool_call>
